title: T-008 — Register qa_status_state_machine_v1 DSL rule (09-a-03)
prompt:
# T-008 — Register qa_status_state_machine_v1 DSL rule

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §10.1 + §10.2 rule definition, 02-SETTINGS §7 Registry, ADR-013
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Register the `qa_status_state_machine_v1` rule in `rule_definitions` (02-SETTINGS Registry) with the JSON definition verbatim from §10.2 and an evaluator that the LP qa_status writer (05-WH owns column, 09-QA writes via API) calls before each transition.

## Implementation contract
1. Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0102_qa_status_rule.sql` INSERT INTO rule_definitions(rule_code, rule_type='workflow', tier='L1', version=1, definition_json) per §10.2 verbatim.
2. Evaluator `apps/web/src/server/quality/qaStatusRule.ts` exports `evaluateTransition({from, to, role, evidence})` returning {ok:true} or {ok:false, error_message} based on the JSON definition; uses error_message_template from rule.
3. Helper consumed by the LP qa_status writer (existing 05-WH endpoint client) in 09-QA — at this task the evaluator runs in pure isolation (no LP write changes).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0102_qa_status_rule.sql [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/qaStatusRule.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/qaStatusRule.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0102 applied, when SELECT FROM rule_definitions WHERE rule_code='qa_status_state_machine_v1' runs, then 1 row exists with version=1 and definition_json containing exactly 12 transitions (per §10.2)
2. Given evaluateTransition({from:'PENDING', to:'PASSED', role:'qa_inspector', evidence:{inspection_id:'X'}}), then result is {ok:true}
3. Given evaluateTransition({from:'HOLD', to:'RELEASED', role:'qa_inspector', evidence:{}}), then result is {ok:false, error_message:'Transition from HOLD to RELEASED not allowed for role qa_inspector'} (requires_role=quality_lead per §10.2)
4. Given evaluateTransition({from:'PENDING', to:'PASSED', role:'qa_inspector', evidence:{}}), then result is {ok:false, error_message includes 'requires_evidence inspection_id'} (V-QA-HOLD evidence enforcement)

pipeline_inputs.description: Register qa_status_state_machine_v1 DSL rule in 02-SETTINGS Registry + provide pure evaluator function with role/evidence enforcement.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0102 inserts the rule definition verbatim from §10.2 into rule_definitions. Evaluator qaStatusRule.ts loads the definition (cached) and validates transitions: from->to allowed pair, requires_role membership, requires_evidence presence, requires_signature flag. Returns {ok,error_message}. Uses error_message_template substitution. No DB writes besides migration; pure logic.
out_of_scope: Do not change rule version mid-task — versioning is migration-driven
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0102 applied, when SELECT FROM rule_definitions WHERE rule_code='qa_status_state_machine_v1' runs, then 1 row with version=1 and definition_json containing exactly 12 transitions per §10.2
Given evaluateTransition({from:'HOLD',to:'RELEASED',role:'qa_inspector',evidence:{}}), then result is {ok:false} with error_message naming the role mismatch
Given evaluateTransition({from:'PENDING',to:'PASSED',role:'qa_inspector',evidence:{}}), then result is {ok:false} with error_message indicating missing requires_evidence inspection_id
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/qaStatusRule.test.ts asserting 4 ACs (12 transitions, role enforce, evidence enforce) before migration exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test qaStatusRule'
risk_red_lines: Do not deviate from §10.2 verbatim transitions (downstream 05-WH writer relies on contract)
Do not skip requires_evidence checks (violations leak unverified state changes)
Do not allow rule edit from runtime UI (registry is migration-only per §10.4)
